summary: Audience recording of a hot performance with jammy Black‑Throated Wind and a lovely Love Light, while Jerry sounds introspective but on his game.
review: The show is described as "quite hot work" for the year, highlighted by an extended jam on Black‑Throated Wind and a beautiful rendition of Love Light. Jerry Garcia’s playing is noted as introspective yet solid. No specific recording flaws are mentioned, suggesting an acceptable audience capture.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed review gives a strong positive impression of the performance and no complaints about sound, leading to a solid rating but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity or mix; assumed decent audience capture with no major issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall energetic set with strong jams, especially the ending Black‑Throated Wind and a nicely rendered Love Light.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Introspective but on his game; solid guitar work noted.
